targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(uptime_seconds) AS v FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(load1) AS v FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(total) AS v FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(zombie) AS v FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(100 - idle_pct) AS v FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(if(mem_total_bytes=0, 0, mem_used_bytes / mem_total_bytes * 100)) AS v FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(rx) AS Rx, sum(tx) AS Tx FROM (SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (rx_cur - rx_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS rx, greatest(0, (tx_cur - tx_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS tx FROM (SELECT time, iface, rx_cur, tx_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(rx_cur) OVER w AS rx_prev, lagInFrame(tx_cur) OVER w AS tx_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(rx_bytes) AS rx_cur, max(tx_bytes) AS tx_cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND iface != 'lo' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, argMax(pct, total) AS Space FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, mount_point, avg(size_total_bytes) AS total, avg(if(size_total_bytes=0, 0, size_used_bytes / size_total_bytes * 100)) AS pct FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, mount_point) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(iops) AS IOPS FROM (SELECT time, device, (greatest(0, r_cur - r_prev) + greatest(0, w_cur - w_prev)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS iops FROM (SELECT time, device, r_cur, w_cur, row_number() OVER win AS rn, lagInFrame(r_cur) OVER win AS r_prev, lagInFrame(w_cur) OVER win AS w_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(reads) AS r_cur, max(writes) AS w_cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW win AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(100 - idle_pct) AS cpu FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(user_pct) AS user, avg(nice_pct) AS nice, avg(system_pct) AS system, avg(iowait_pct) AS iowait, avg(irq_pct) AS irq, avg(softirq_pct) AS softirq, avg(steal_pct) AS steal, avg(guest_pct) AS guest FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(load1) AS load1, avg(load5) AS load5, avg(load15) AS load15 FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(procs_running) AS running, avg(procs_blocked) AS blocked FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='cpu' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, greatest(0, (ctxt_cur - ctxt_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS ctxt_sw, greatest(0, (int_cur - int_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS interrupts, greatest(0, (si_cur - si_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS softirqs, greatest(0, (fk_cur - fk_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS forks FROM (SELECT time, ctxt_cur, int_cur, si_cur, fk_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(ctxt_cur) OVER w AS ctxt_prev, lagInFrame(int_cur) OVER w AS int_prev, lagInFrame(si_cur) OVER w AS si_prev, lagInFrame(fk_cur) OVER w AS fk_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(context_switches) AS ctxt_cur, max(interrupts) AS int_cur, max(softirqs) AS si_cur, max(forks) AS fk_cur FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(freq_used_hz) AS freq_used_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(freq_hz) AS freq_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, max(temp_c) AS temp_c FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(voltage_v) AS voltage FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, avg(power_pkg_watts) AS watts FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, avg(uncore_freq_hz) AS uncore_freq_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, max(thermal_throttle_events) AS events FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(mem_used_bytes) AS used, avg(cached_bytes) AS cached, avg(buffers_bytes) AS buffers, avg(mem_total_bytes - mem_used_bytes - cached_bytes - buffers_bytes) AS free FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(swap_total_bytes - swap_free_bytes) AS swap_used, avg(swap_cached_bytes) AS swap_cached FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='memory' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(anon_pages_bytes) AS anon, avg(mapped_bytes) AS mapped, avg(shmem_bytes) AS shmem, avg(dirty_bytes) AS dirty, avg(writeback_bytes) AS writeback, avg(sreclaimable_bytes) AS slab_reclaim, avg(sunreclaim_bytes) AS slab_unreclaim FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(huge_pages_total) AS total, avg(huge_pages_free) AS free FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, greatest(0, (min_cur - min_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS minor_fault, greatest(0, (maj_cur - maj_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS major_fault, greatest(0, (swi_cur - swi_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS swap_in, greatest(0, (swo_cur - swo_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS swap_out, greatest(0, (sd_cur - sd_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS scan_direct, greatest(0, (sk_cur - sk_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS scan_kswapd FROM (SELECT time, min_cur, maj_cur, swi_cur, swo_cur, sd_cur, sk_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(min_cur) OVER w AS min_prev, lagInFrame(maj_cur) OVER w AS maj_prev, lagInFrame(swi_cur) OVER w AS swi_prev, lagInFrame(swo_cur) OVER w AS swo_prev, lagInFrame(sd_cur) OVER w AS sd_prev, lagInFrame(sk_cur) OVER w AS sk_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(pgfault) AS min_cur, max(pgmajfault) AS maj_cur, max(pswpin) AS swi_cur, max(pswpout) AS swo_cur, max(pgscan_direct) AS sd_cur, max(pgscan_kswapd) AS sk_cur FROM ${database}.memory_vmstat WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(oom_kill) AS oom_kill FROM ${database}.memory_vmstat WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, device, greatest(0, (cur - prev)) * 512 / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM (SELECT time, device, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(read_sectors) AS cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, device, greatest(0, (cur - prev)) * 512 / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM (SELECT time, device, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(write_sectors) AS cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, device, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS iops FROM (SELECT time, device, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(reads) AS cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, device, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS iops FROM (SELECT time, device, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(writes) AS cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, device, if(reads_d = 0, 0, readt_d / reads_d) AS read_ms, if(writes_d = 0, 0, writet_d / writes_d) AS write_ms FROM (SELECT time, device, greatest(0, reads_cur - reads_prev) AS reads_d, greatest(0, readt_cur - readt_prev) AS readt_d, greatest(0, writes_cur - writes_prev) AS writes_d, greatest(0, writet_cur - writet_prev) AS writet_d FROM (SELECT time, device, reads_cur, readt_cur, writes_cur, writet_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(reads_cur) OVER w AS reads_prev, lagInFrame(readt_cur) OVER w AS readt_prev, lagInFrame(writes_cur) OVER w AS writes_prev, lagInFrame(writet_cur) OVER w AS writet_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(reads) AS reads_cur, max(read_time_ms) AS readt_cur, max(writes) AS writes_cur, max(write_time_ms) AS writet_cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1) ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, device, least(100, greatest(0, (cur - prev)) / greatest($__interval_s * 1000, 1) * 100) AS util FROM (SELECT time, device, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(io_time_ms) AS cur FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(io_in_progress) AS queue FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='io' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, mount_point, avg(if(size_total_bytes=0, 0, size_used_bytes / size_total_bytes * 100)) AS pct FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, mount_point ORDER BY time, mount_point

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, mount_point, avg(if(inodes_total=0, 0, inodes_used / inodes_total * 100)) AS pct FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, mount_point ORDER BY time, mount_point

SELECT mount_point, fstype, device, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_total_bytes, ts)) AS total, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_used_bytes, ts)) AS used, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_available_bytes, ts)) AS avail, round(argMax(if(size_total_bytes=0, 0, size_used_bytes / size_total_bytes * 100), ts), 1) AS pct, argMax(inodes_used, ts) AS inodes_used, argMax(inodes_total, ts) AS inodes_total, argMax(read_only, ts) AS ro FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY mount_point, fstype, device ORDER BY pct DESC

SELECT device, argMax(model, ts) AS model, argMax(serial, ts) AS serial, argMax(firmware, ts) AS firmware, argMax(temp_c, ts) AS temp_c, argMax(power_on_hours, ts) AS power_on_hrs, argMax(power_cycle_count, ts) AS power_cycles, argMax(reallocated_sectors, ts) AS realloc, argMax(pending_sectors, ts) AS pending, argMax(uncorrectable_sectors, ts) AS uncorrect, argMax(crc_errors, ts) AS crc, argMax(wear_leveling_pct, ts) AS wear_pct, argMax(health_ok, ts) AS ok FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY device ORDER BY device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(temp_c) AS temp_c FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, avg(wear_leveling_pct) AS wear FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(reallocated_sectors) AS realloc, max(pending_sectors) AS pending, max(uncorrectable_sectors) AS uncorrect, max(crc_errors) AS crc FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS bps FROM (SELECT time, iface, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(rx_bytes) AS cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS bps FROM (SELECT time, iface, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(tx_bytes) AS cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS pps FROM (SELECT time, iface, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(rx_packets) AS cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (cur - prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS pps FROM (SELECT time, iface, cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(cur) OVER w AS prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(tx_packets) AS cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (errs_cur - errs_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS errors, greatest(0, (drop_cur - drop_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS dropped FROM (SELECT time, iface, errs_cur, drop_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(errs_cur) OVER w AS errs_prev, lagInFrame(drop_cur) OVER w AS drop_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(rx_errors) AS errs_cur, max(rx_dropped) AS drop_cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT time, iface, greatest(0, (errs_cur - errs_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS errors, greatest(0, (drop_cur - drop_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS dropped, greatest(0, (coll_cur - coll_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS collisions FROM (SELECT time, iface, errs_cur, drop_cur, coll_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(errs_cur) OVER w AS errs_prev, lagInFrame(drop_cur) OVER w AS drop_prev, lagInFrame(coll_cur) OVER w AS coll_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, max(tx_errors) AS errs_cur, max(tx_dropped) AS drop_cur, max(tx_collisions) AS coll_cur FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY iface ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT iface, argMax(speed_mbps, ts) AS speed_mbps, argMax(duplex, ts) AS duplex, argMax(link_up, ts) AS link_up, formatReadableSize(argMax(rx_bytes, ts)) AS rx_total, formatReadableSize(argMax(tx_bytes, ts)) AS tx_total, argMax(rx_errors, ts) AS rx_errs, argMax(tx_errors, ts) AS tx_errs, argMax(rx_dropped, ts) AS rx_drop, argMax(tx_dropped, ts) AS tx_drop FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY iface ORDER BY iface

SELECT time, greatest(0, (in_cur - in_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS in_segs, greatest(0, (out_cur - out_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS out_segs FROM (SELECT time, in_cur, out_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(in_cur) OVER w AS in_prev, lagInFrame(out_cur) OVER w AS out_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(in_segs) AS in_cur, max(out_segs) AS out_cur FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(curr_estab) AS curr_estab FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, greatest(0, (act_cur - act_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS active, greatest(0, (pas_cur - pas_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS passive FROM (SELECT time, act_cur, pas_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(act_cur) OVER w AS act_prev, lagInFrame(pas_cur) OVER w AS pas_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(active_opens) AS act_cur, max(passive_opens) AS pas_cur FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, greatest(0, (tot_cur - tot_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS total, greatest(0, (lost_cur - lost_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS lost, greatest(0, (fast_cur - fast_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS fast, greatest(0, (slow_cur - slow_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS slow_start FROM (SELECT time, tot_cur, lost_cur, fast_cur, slow_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(tot_cur) OVER w AS tot_prev, lagInFrame(lost_cur) OVER w AS lost_prev, lagInFrame(fast_cur) OVER w AS fast_prev, lagInFrame(slow_cur) OVER w AS slow_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(retrans_segs) AS tot_cur, max(tcp_lost_retransmit) AS lost_cur, max(tcp_fast_retrans) AS fast_cur, max(tcp_slow_start_retrans) AS slow_cur FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, greatest(0, (af_cur - af_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS attempt_fails, greatest(0, (er_cur - er_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS estab_resets, greatest(0, (ld_cur - ld_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS listen_drops, greatest(0, (lo_cur - lo_prev) / greatest($__interval_s, 1)) AS listen_overflows FROM (SELECT time, af_cur, er_cur, ld_cur, lo_cur, row_number() OVER w AS rn, lagInFrame(af_cur) OVER w AS af_prev, lagInFrame(er_cur) OVER w AS er_prev, lagInFrame(ld_cur) OVER w AS ld_prev, lagInFrame(lo_cur) OVER w AS lo_prev FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(attempt_fails) AS af_cur, max(estab_resets) AS er_cur, max(listen_drops) AS ld_cur, max(listen_overflows) AS lo_cur FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time) WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)) WHERE rn > 1 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, concat(family, '/', state) AS label, avg(count) AS count FROM ${database}.network_socket_states WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, label ORDER BY time, label
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(count) AS count, avg(max) AS max FROM ${database}.network_conntrack WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(running) AS running, avg(sleeping) AS sleeping, avg(disk_sleep) AS disk_sleep, avg(stopped) AS stopped, avg(zombie) AS zombie, avg(idle) AS idle FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT pid, comm, round(avg(cpu_user_pct + cpu_system_pct), 2) AS cpu_pct, round(avg(rss_bytes)/1024/1024, 1) AS rss_mb, avg(threads) AS threads, avg(fds) AS fds FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY cpu_pct DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss, formatReadableSize(argMax(vsz_bytes, ts)) AS vsz, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY argMax(rss_bytes, ts) DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY fds DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY threads DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, max(majflt) - min(majflt) AS major_faults, max(minflt) - min(minflt) AS minor_faults, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm HAVING major_faults > 0 ORDER BY major_faults DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT host, argMax(kernel_version, ts) AS kernel, argMax(os_release, ts) AS os, argMax(uptime_seconds, ts) AS uptime_s, argMax(users_logged_in, ts) AS users, argMax(fds_allocated, ts) AS fds_used, argMax(fds_max, ts) AS fds_max FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY host
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(fds_allocated) AS allocated, avg(fds_max) AS max FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(users_logged_in) AS users FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

list.name: database
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT name FROM system.databases WHERE name NOT IN ('system','INFORMATION_SCHEMA','information_schema') ORDER BY name

list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats ORDER BY host
